use_cases: Selecting dates for appointment booking in healthcare or service applications
Scheduling events and meetings with date and time fields
Setting deadlines or due dates in project management tools
Choosing delivery or pickup times in e-commerce checkout flows
Recording timestamps for financial transactions or logs
ai_summary: A shadcn-style calendar date and time picker component that provides a combined interface for selecting both date and time values. Features a clean, minimalist design with click-based date selection and integrated time picker functionality. Built with Radix UI primitives for accessibility and uses standard Tailwind CSS for styling consistency.
